nodes.label: Second Thought Project
nodes.description: A Manifest V3 Chrome extension that sends tab URLs and selected text to a local Second Thought /share endpoint

nodes.label: Browser Extension
nodes.description: Manifest V3 Chrome extension component that captures and sends web content

nodes.label: Manifest V3
nodes.description: Chrome extension manifest version used by Second Thought

nodes.label: /share Endpoint
nodes.description: Local server endpoint that receives captured content (URL and selection)

nodes.label: server.py
nodes.description: Backend server component that processes shared content

nodes.label: Enrichment Router
nodes.description: Routes content based on selection presence: URL path if no selection, text path if selection present

nodes.label: LLM Engine
nodes.description: Processes enriched content using language models

nodes.label: Storage Engine
nodes.description: Stores processed content to the vault

nodes.label: Vault
nodes.description: Storage system where enriched notes are written

nodes.label: Capture Feature
nodes.description: Core functionality to capture current page URL and selected text

nodes.label: Popup UI
nodes.description: User interface in the browser extension popup showing pre-filled URL and selection

nodes.label: Right-Click Menu
nodes.description: Context menu with options to send selection or entire page to Second Thought

nodes.label: Developer Mode Setup
nodes.description: Installation process for the browser extension in developer mode

nodes.label: Extension Settings
nodes.description: Configuration interface for server URL and authentication secret

nodes.label: Server URL Configuration
nodes.description: Setting for the local endpoint URL, defaults to http://localhost:7070

nodes.label: OMNI_GUI_SECRET
nodes.description: Optional X-Omni-Secret header for server authentication

nodes.label: Pipeline Animation
nodes.description: Visual animation of pipeline steps as a note is processed

nodes.label: Status Badge
nodes.description: Visual indicator (checkmark or X) that appears briefly on extension icon after action

nodes.label: Community Skills
nodes.description: Community-contributed skills installed in the project

nodes.label: taste-skill
nodes.description: Installed community skill by Leonxlnx for design and UI enhancement

nodes.label: Skills Management
nodes.description: Process for adding, removing, and listing community skills

nodes.label: Community Registry
nodes.description: Community registry from which skills are loaded and installed

nodes.label: .claude/skills/
nodes.description: Directory where installed skills are stored

nodes.label: Clipboard-Free Design
nodes.description: Design principle that avoids reading or writing to system clipboard

nodes.label: Content Capture
nodes.description: Process of capturing URL, title, and selected text from the browser

nodes.label: Content Enrichment
nodes.description: Process of enhancing captured content through routing and LLM processing

nodes.label: URL Path
nodes.description: Router path used when no text selection is present

nodes.label: Text Path
nodes.description: Router path used when text selection is present

hyperedges.label: Content Processing Pipeline
hyperedges.description: Complete pipeline from content capture to vault storage

hyperedges.label: User Interaction Methods
hyperedges.description: Two primary ways users interact with the extension
